candidates.why: This is the only operating D&A row tied to COGS. However, it appears as a component under the selected parent bucket 'Production costs': in the visible years where populated, 'Production costs - Balancing value' plus 'Amortization in COR/COGS' equals 'Production costs', indicating the amortization is already embedded in the selected COGS row and should not be added separately.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is [Income Statement] Production costs. The separate COGS amortization line looks like a sub-component of that selected total, so adding it would double count.

candidates.why: This is the relevant operating D&A row for SG&A, but it is blank in the provided excerpt. With no populated separate SG&A D&A line shown above operating profit, the conservative conclusion is that any SG&A D&A is already embedded in the selected 'Selling and administrative expenses' row or not separately disclosed, so nothing should be added separately.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is [Income Statement] Selling and administrative expenses. No populated separate SG&A D&A row is visible; XRD is empty, so no special R&D D&A adjustment applies.
